---
title: ""
date: ""
---

### Professional Background
::: columns
::: {.column width="4%"}
{{< fa chart-line size=normalsize >}}<br>
{{< fa code-branch size=normalsize >}}<br>
{{< fa hard-drive size=small >}}<br>
{{< fa person-circle-plus size=normalsize >}}<br>
{{< fa brain size=normalsize >}}
:::

::: {.column width="96%"}
***Data Science:*** \ Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;<br/>
***Data Engineering:*** \ End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Dataset transformations;<br/>
***Data Management:*** \ Data centralization and governance; High-performance computing clusters;<br/>
***Clinical Trials:*** \ Drug and behavioral interventions.<br/>
***Neuroimaging:*** \ Magnetic Resonance Imaging analysis of the human brain.
:::
:::

### Programming & Tools
::: columns
::: {.column width="46%"}
<i class="fa-brands fa-r-project fa-xs"></i> \ \ R \ (tidyverse, targets, Shiny) \ \ <br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-python"></i> \ \ Python (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)<br/>
![](images/matlab_icon2){.absolute .matlab-icon width="14"} \ \ MATLAB
:::

::: {.column width="36%"}
<i class="fa-solid fa-terminal fa-xs"></i> \ \ Shell Scripting (Bash, zsh)<br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-git-alt"></i> \ \ Git<br/>
<i class="fa-brands fa-docker fa-sm"></i> \ Docker<br/>
:::

::: {.column width="12%"}
-   **XNAT**
-   **FlyWheel**
-   **FSL**
:::
:::

###  Experience

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/keck_med_seal.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Jun 2025 - Present`{style="float: right; 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} **University of Southern California, Los Angeles CA** <br/> 
Data Engineer (Resource Employee), *Laboratory of NeuroImaging* 

- Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server to support multi-site neuroimaging data governance, querying, and analysis workflows.
- Deployed and managed imaging informatics platform (XNAT) to centralize MRI data and establish
infrastructure for multi-site neuroimaging research projects.
- Collaborated with Principal Investigator to adapt infrastructure and data workflows to changing analytical and experimental requirements.
:::
:::


::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
**Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA** `Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} 
<br/> Research Assistant, *Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group*

- Developed automated, containerized neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines (Docker-based), improving
reproducibility and efficiency of analytical workflows.
- Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets to support interpretation of neuroimaging signals and
downstream machine learning and statistical analyses.
- Implemented data quality control and validation procedures to ensure reliability of cleaned datasets and
downstream analysis and reporting.
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
`Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA** <br/> 
Programmer, *Center for Addiction Medicine* <br/>

- Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (with Git) to ingest and process incoming
clinical trial data, generating clean datasets and statistical results.
- Developed dashboards to monitor data ingestion, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve
visualization of summary statistics to support ongoing data reviews.
- Led recurring data review sessions, identifying data trends, inconsistencies, or risks, and opportunities to
improve data quality and workflow efficiency.
- Collaborated with biostatisticians and investigators to support statistical analysis and interpretation of complex
behavioral and biomedical data.
- Managed EDC research databases (REDCap) and automated data extraction via API integration with a strong oversight on
data quality.
- Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis.
- Trained programmers on code reproducibility, software engineering, and privacy regulations in research.
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="9%"}
![](images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="45"}
:::

::: {.column width="91%"}
**Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"} <br/> 
Research Intern, *Developmental Neuropsychology Lab* <br/>

-   Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA.
:::
:::

<br>
